description: list available infographic types, industry styles, colorblind-safe palettes, and document-type quality thresholds (read-only, offline)
rules: read-only — prints reference options, no generation
fully offline — needs no API key and no network
captures the option listing to options.txt under record_store
usage: No vars required. Runs `generate_infographic.py --list-options`. Output: options.txt.
limitation: Informational only: enumerates the 10 types / 8 styles / 3 palettes / 7 doc-type thresholds. Generates no infographic.
